title: Raja Rani
actors: K.S. Angamuthu, O.A.K. Devar, Appa K. Duraiswamy
plot: Raja Rani is a 1975 Indian Tamil film, directed by A. Bhimsingh and produced by Kannadasan. The film stars Sivaji Ganesan, Padimini, S.S.Rajendran in lead roles. The film had musical score by T. R. Papa. Watch the full movie, Raja...
